improvis-e/play/mind/fake.ex: We had to improvis-e a shelter tonight.

improviser/man/play.def: 即興創作者及其它的人的人物 (單數) (員)
improviser/man/play.ex: He is a great musical improviser, sir.

imprud-.def: 慎的人的人人物 (單數) (慎)

imprudence/bad/weak.def: 輕率、(喻)不明智行為人物 (單數) (莽/笨)
imprudence/bad/weak.ex: An act of extreme imprudence, let me say.

imprudent/bad/weak.def: 輕率的、(喻)不明智地的人人物 (單數) (莽/魯/笨)
imprudent/bad/weak.ex: It would be imprudent to go out now.

imprudently/bad-ly/weakly.ex: He acted imprudently in the_crisis, alas.

imp-.def: 不、潔的人的人人物 (單數) (濁)
imp-.ex: The_water was impure and dirty, alas.

impur-.def: 濁的人的人人物 (單數) (濁)

impure/bad/dark.def: 不純的、(喻)不潔的、下流地的人的人物 (單數) (濁/穢/混)
impure/bad/dark.col: impure air, impure motive, impure gold
impure/bad/dark.ex: Impure water can cause disease, alas.

impurely/bad-ly/dark-ly.ex: Dealing with facts impurely, let me say.

impurity/badness/darkness.def: 不純、(喻)不潔物、(複)雜質人物 (單數) (濁/渣)

imput-.def: 歸、咎的人的人人物 (單數) (咎)
imput-.ex: A serious imputation on his character.

imputation/bad/talk.def: 歸咎、(喻)非難人物 (單數) (咎)
imputation/bad/talk.ex: The_imputation was false and cruel, alas.

impute/bad/talk.def: 歸咎於、(喻)把...歸功於的人的人 (咎/功)
impute/bad/talk.ex: Don't impute bad motive-s to her, sir.

impul-s-.def: 推、衝的人的人人物 (單數) (推)
impul-s-.ex: Act-ing on a sudden impulse tonight.

impulse/move/huge.def: 衝動、(喻)動力、(物/電)脈衝人物 (單數) (衝/動)
impulse/move/huge.col: impulse buy, sudden impulse, electric impulse
impulse/move/huge.ex: He act-ed on an impulse and bought a car.

impulsion/move/huge.def: 推動力、(喻)衝動的人物 (單數) (推)
impulsion/move/huge.ex: The_impulsion came from inner desire, sir.

impulsive/move-/fast.def: 衝動的、(喻)推進地的人的人物 (單數) (衝/動/急)
impulsive/move-/fast.ex: Try not to be too impulsive today, sir.

impulsively/fast-ly.ex: He impulsively propose-d to her, indeed.

impu-.def: 責、懲的人的人人物 (單數) (責)
impu-.ex: They broke the_law with impunity, alas.

impunity/bad/well.def: 免受懲罰、(喻)無患、不受傷人物 (單數) (免/肆)
impunity/bad/well.ex: No one can break rule-s with impunity.

impu_t-.def: 算的的人的人人物 (單數) (算)

imputable/bad-.def: 可歸咎的、(喻)其地的人的人物 (單數) (咎)

im-.def: 在、內、不的人的人人物 (單數) (不/內)
im-.ex: An immense joy filled the_world, indeed.

im-p_u_r-.def: 淨的人的人人物 (單數) (淨)

im-p_u-.def: 不的人的人人物 (單數) (不)

impatience/bad/mind.def: 焦急、(喻)不耐煩人物 (單數) ( impatience )
impatience/bad/mind.ex: He wait-ed with growing impatience, alas.
